---
id: list-snapshots-kpi-graphs-graph-id-snapshots-get
title: "List daily KPI snapshots"
description: "Returns a time-series of daily graph KPI snapshots for a single public graph identifier. Use the `metrics` query parameter to request a compact projection suitable for charts."
sidebar_label: "List daily KPI snapshots"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/graph-kpi/wordlift-graph-kpi-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List daily KPI snapshots"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/kpi/graphs/{graph_id}/snapshots"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a time-series of daily graph KPI snapshots for a single public graph identifier. Use the `metrics` query parameter to request a compact projection suitable for charts.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"graph_id","in":"path","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Public WordLift graph identifier (`account.id`).","title":"Graph Id","example":"1506805"},"description":"Public WordLift graph identifier (`account.id`)."},{"name":"date_from","in":"query","required":false,"schema":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"description":"Inclusive lower snapshot date bound in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.","title":"Date From","example":"2026-03-01"},"description":"Inclusive lower snapshot date bound in `YYYY-MM-DD` format."},{"name":"date_to","in":"query","required":false,"schema":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"description":"Inclusive upper snapshot date bound in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.","title":"Date To","example":"2026-03-13"},"description":"Inclusive upper snapshot date bound in `YYYY-MM-DD` format."},{"name":"limit","in":"query","required":false,"schema":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer","minimum":1},{"type":"null"}],"description":"Maximum number of snapshot rows to return.","title":"Limit","example":30},"description":"Maximum number of snapshot rows to return."},{"name":"metrics","in":"query","required":false,"schema":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"description":"Comma-separated KPI field projection for compact chart responses.","title":"Metrics","example":"all_total_entities,all_total_triples,all_edges_count"},"description":"Comma-separated KPI field projection for compact chart responses."}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Daily KPI snapshot history for the graph.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"items":{"items":{"properties":{"graph_id":{"type":"string","title":"Graph Id","description":"Public WordLift graph identifier.","example":"1506805"},"snapshot_date":{"type":"string","title":"Snapshot Date","description":"Logical KPI day for this snapshot in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.","example":"2026-03-13"},"calculated_at":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Calculated At","description":"Timestamp when the graph-wide KPI calculation finished.","example":"2026-03-13T17:42:11Z"},"dataset_id":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Dataset Id","description":"Dataset identity used to compute this snapshot. Clone reuse is allowed only when the current dataset identity matches this value.","example":"677fe88046061868443428fa"},"snapshot_origin":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Snapshot Origin","description":"How this snapshot was produced: `calculated` for a full worker run or `cloned` when the previous validated snapshot was reused because the graph source watermark and worker policy inputs had not changed.","example":"calculated"},"cloned_from_snapshot_date":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Cloned From Snapshot Date","description":"When `snapshot_origin=cloned`, the source snapshot day copied into this row.","example":"2026-03-12"},"source_watermark":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Source Watermark","description":"Latest source-graph `_modified_` watermark observed for the dataset when this snapshot was produced.","example":"2026-03-13T17:35:19+00:00"},"kpi_worker_version":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Kpi Worker Version","description":"Worker package version used for clone eligibility and snapshot provenance.","example":"0.2.1"},"validation_rules_fingerprint":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Validation Rules Fingerprint","description":"Stable fingerprint of the validation selector and options that affect SHACL/rich-snippet outcomes.","example":"d80c5dfb1c704f738f7662ee2a650c4a21ddbbf95d5af4f4fefb162eb4d53f04"},"validated_at":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Validated At","description":"Timestamp when SHACL/rich-snippet validation finished.","example":"2026-03-13T17:50:02Z"},"all_total_entities":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Total Entities","description":"All entities in the graph snapshot."},"public_total_entities":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Total Entities","description":"Entities that have at least one public assertion."},"private_total_entities":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Total Entities","description":"Entities that have no public assertions."},"all_total_properties":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Total Properties","description":"All non-`rdf:type` assertions in the snapshot."},"public_total_properties":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Total Properties","description":"Non-`rdf:type` assertions whose predicate is public."},"private_total_properties":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Total Properties","description":"Non-`rdf:type` assertions whose predicate is private."},"all_total_triples":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Total Triples","description":"All assertions in the snapshot, including `rdf:type`."},"public_total_triples":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Total Triples","description":"Assertions whose predicate is public."},"private_total_triples":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Total Triples","description":"Assertions whose predicate is private."},"all_internal_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Internal Edges Count","description":"Internal links across all assertions, excluding literals and `rdf:type`."},"public_internal_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Internal Edges Count","description":"Internal links created by public assertions."},"private_internal_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Internal Edges Count","description":"Internal links created by private assertions."},"all_external_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All External Edges Count","description":"External links across all assertions, excluding literals and `rdf:type`."},"public_external_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public External Edges Count","description":"External links created by public assertions."},"private_external_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private External Edges Count","description":"External links created by private assertions."},"all_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Edges Count","description":"All internal and external links, excluding literals and `rdf:type`."},"public_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Edges Count","description":"Edges created by public assertions only."},"private_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Edges Count","description":"Edges created by private assertions only."},"all_edge_node_ratio":{"anyOf":[{"type":"number"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Edge Node Ratio","description":"All edges divided by all entities."},"public_edge_node_ratio":{"anyOf":[{"type":"number"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Edge Node Ratio","description":"Public edges divided by public entities."},"private_edge_node_ratio":{"anyOf":[{"type":"number"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Edge Node Ratio","description":"Private edges divided by private entities."},"all_edge_node_ratio_edges":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Edge Node Ratio Edges","description":"Numerator used for `all_edge_node_ratio`."},"public_edge_node_ratio_edges":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Edge Node Ratio Edges","description":"Numerator used for `public_edge_node_ratio`."},"private_edge_node_ratio_edges":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Edge Node Ratio Edges","description":"Numerator used for `private_edge_node_ratio`."},"all_edge_node_ratio_nodes":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Edge Node Ratio Nodes","description":"Denominator used for `all_edge_node_ratio`."},"public_edge_node_ratio_nodes":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Edge Node Ratio Nodes","description":"Denominator used for `public_edge_node_ratio`."},"private_edge_node_ratio_nodes":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Edge Node Ratio Nodes","description":"Denominator used for `private_edge_node_ratio`."},"all_unique_urls_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Unique Urls Count","description":"Distinct `schema:url` values in the snapshot."},"public_unique_urls_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Unique Urls Count","description":"Same as `all_unique_urls_count` because `schema:url` is public."},"private_unique_urls_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Unique Urls Count","description":"Always `0` because `schema:url` is not private."},"all_orphans_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Orphans Count","description":"Public orphans plus private orphans."},"public_orphans_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Orphans Count","description":"Public entities that are never targets of public internal edges."},"private_orphans_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Orphans Count","description":"Private entities that are never targets of any internal edges."},"all_broken_links_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Broken Links Count","description":"Public broken links plus private broken links."},"public_broken_links_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Broken Links Count","description":"Missing targets referenced by public internal edges."},"private_broken_links_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Broken Links Count","description":"Missing targets referenced by private internal edges."},"all_isolated_graphs_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Isolated Graphs Count","description":"Public isolated graphs plus private isolated graphs."},"public_isolated_graphs_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Isolated Graphs Count","description":"Connected components built from public entities and public internal edges."},"private_isolated_graphs_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Isolated Graphs Count","description":"Connected components for private entities using public internal edges that connect private entities."},"all_duplicates_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Duplicates Count","description":"Duplicate groups sharing the same `schema:url`."},"public_duplicates_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Duplicates Count","description":"Same as `all_duplicates_count` because `schema:url` is public."},"private_duplicates_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Duplicates Count","description":"Always `0` because `schema:url` is not private."},"all_entity_types":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":{"type":"integer"},"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Entity Types","description":"Counts of all `rdf:type` assertions grouped by type IRI."},"public_entity_types":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":{"type":"integer"},"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Entity Types","description":"Counts of `rdf:type` assertions whose type IRI is not in a private namespace."},"private_entity_types":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":{"type":"integer"},"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Entity Types","description":"Counts of `rdf:type` assertions whose type IRI is in a private namespace."},"all_properties_by_predicate":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":{"type":"integer"},"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Properties By Predicate","description":"Counts of non-`rdf:type` assertions grouped by predicate."},"public_properties_by_predicate":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":{"type":"integer"},"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Properties By Predicate","description":"Counts of non-`rdf:type` assertions grouped by public predicate."},"private_properties_by_predicate":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":{"type":"integer"},"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Properties By Predicate","description":"Counts of non-`rdf:type` assertions grouped by private predicate."},"rich_snippets_valid_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Rich Snippets Valid Count","description":"Public rich-snippet items that passed validation."},"rich_snippets_invalid_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Rich Snippets Invalid Count","description":"Public rich-snippet items that failed validation."},"rich_snippets_by_type":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":{"additionalProperties":{"type":"integer"},"type":"object"},"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Rich Snippets By Type","description":"Public rich-snippet counts grouped by type and eligibility bucket."},"schema_compliance_errors":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Schema Compliance Errors","description":"Schema-compliance errors found in public URL-generated subgraphs."},"schema_compliance_warnings":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Schema Compliance Warnings","description":"Schema-compliance warnings found in public URL-generated subgraphs."},"schema_compliance_urls_checked":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Schema Compliance Urls Checked","description":"Number of public URLs validated for schema compliance."},"graph_health_score":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Graph Health Score","description":"Composite graph health score from `0` to `100` based on validation, structure, public footprint, and freshness."},"graph_health_validation_health":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Graph Health Validation Health","description":"Validation-health subscore used in `graph_health_score`."},"graph_health_structural_integrity":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Graph Health Structural Integrity","description":"Structural-integrity subscore used in `graph_health_score`."},"graph_health_public_footprint_quality":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Graph Health Public Footprint Quality","description":"Public-footprint-quality subscore used in `graph_health_score`."},"graph_health_freshness_momentum":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Graph Health Freshness Momentum","description":"Freshness-and-momentum subscore used in `graph_health_score`."}},"additionalProperties":true,"type":"object","required":["graph_id","snapshot_date"],"title":"SnapshotResponse"},"type":"array","title":"Items"},"page":{"properties":{"next_cursor":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Next Cursor","description":"Opaque cursor for the next page. `null` means there is no next page."}},"type":"object","title":"CursorPage"}},"type":"object","required":["items","page"],"title":"SnapshotListResponse"},"example":{"items":[{"graph_id":"1506805","snapshot_date":"2026-03-13","all_total_entities":58730,"public_total_entities":56211,"private_total_entities":2519,"all_total_triples":488511,"all_edges_count":176597,"rich_snippets_valid_count":320,"schema_compliance_warnings":11441}],"page":{}}}}},"400":{"description":"The request was syntactically valid but semantically invalid.","content":{"application/problem+json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["type","title","status","detail"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"Problem type for this problem response.","example":403},"detail":{"type":"string","description":"Human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.","example":"Administrator access is required for this endpoint."}},"example":{"type":"about:blank","title":"Forbidden","status":403,"detail":"Administrator access is required for this endpoint."},"title":"Problem"}}}},"403":{"description":"The caller is not authorized to operate on the requested
